Grandma's Salmon Bowls

Let me tell you a long story about the summer I first made these bowls...

Anyway, here is roughly what you do: get some salmon, some rice, some avocado, and a bit of soy sauce. Cook the salmon, make the rice, assemble.

There is no structured recipe markup on this page at all, which is exactly why the schema.org scraper cannot pull clean ingredients or steps from it.
